name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or change to the package
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Use case

<!-- What are you trying to do, and where does the package fall short today?
Describe the problem rather than the solution. -->

## Proposed API

<!-- What would the code look like if this existed? A concrete sketch is more
useful than a description. -->

```ts
import { getDiary } from 'letterboxd-rss';

// ...
```

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Including whether this can already be done in consumer code. The package
deliberately returns raw ISO dates and plain text so that presentation concerns
stay outside it. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Note that this package has zero runtime dependencies, which is a deliberate
constraint. A proposal that needs one should say so and explain why. -->
